page_content:
Formerly: EDCI604.

TLPL623 Learning and Teaching Biological Sciences (3 Credits) Engagement in laboratory and inquiry-based methods to develop coherent understandings about the natural world and explore issues learning in biology. Personal engagement with phenomena and reflection on the learning and instructional experiences.

Restriction: Enrollment in an EDCI Outreach Program in science education; or must be in Curriculum and Instruction (Master's) program; or permission of instructor.

Credit Only Granted for. EDCI606 or TLPL623.
